data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Attendance tracking per session', but the evidence does not confirm that the system tracks attendance for each session as required. While the linked use case mentions attendance tracking, it does not provide concrete evidence of the API's capability to track attendance per session. The absence of specific API reads or persisted state checks related to attendance tracking constitutes a gap in the requirement validation.
gaps: No evidence of API functionality to track attendance per session.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
